claims.claim: No price/market-timing view; index on technology not the tape
claims.label: confirmed

missed_changes: New emphasis on open source as a public good / 'free speech' (Jolt Alpha released 100% open source)

Focus on cross-chain bridges and interoperability via LayerZero (hosted podcast, sybil-detection commentary) — interoperability framed more concretely than the original Espresso/shared-sequencing framing
Promotion of L3s as a scaling direction ('The promise of L3s')
Specific new energy/grid DePIN bet (Daylight — distributed energy resources / virtual power plants), extending DePIN into energy infrastructure
Identified NEAR as the 'epicenter for AI x crypto,' a chain-specific stance the prediction did not anticipate
notes: Technology convictions held up strongly and were acted on within the window: EigenLayer ('verifiable cloud'), Jolt/ZK, Aleo (privacy/design-space), AI×crypto (NEAR), and DePIN (Daylight energy). Fragmentation concern shows up indirectly via repeated enthusiasm for composability/cross-chain fixes (CSX, LayerZero, 'seamless composability'), treated as a problem being solved. The casino/memecoin concerns and the explicit no-token-bets stance were simply not revisited in the window (absent, not contradicted). Risk_regime 'no_view' is consistent — no price/timing commentary; he continued indexing on long-term tech progress (mid-90s-internet analogy).
